notes:
Fixed

  • 1-to-1 Calls: Fixed a critical bug where calls could not connect due to a permissions error during call cleanup.
  • Notification Sound: Fixed ring sound being cut off before it finished playing.

Improved

  • Call Button: Greyed out when the person is already in a call.
  • Bell Sound: Subtle feedback sound when you ring someone's bell.
  • AI Agent Calls: Admins can now call Bavic directly.
